summary: This directory contains two subdirectories: garlicpress (core system) and tests (test suite). The garlicpress directory shows moderate health with 6 contradictions indicating integration risks around data structure mismatches and missing error handling. The tests directory has 2 contradictions related to test reliability. Key patterns include: 1) Widespread implicit assumptions about external dependencies without validation, 2) Insufficient error handling leading to potential silent failures, 3) Data structure compatibility issues between modules. The escalated flags represent unresolved dependencies between modules that require cross-directory verification.
